task_completion.description: Create a new calendar named 'Weekend Override' with Saturdays as working days
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calendar configuration window or dialog showing a new calendar named 'Weekend Override' with Saturday selected or highlighted as a working time/day.
The main task list showing a new row with the task name 'Post-Deployment Checks' and a duration of '1 day' or '1d'.

task_completion.description: Make the new task a successor to Task 15
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Predecessors' column for the 'Post-Deployment Checks' task showing '15', or a link line in the Gantt chart connecting Task 15 to the new task.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Weekend Override' calendar to the 'Post-Deployment Checks' task
task_completion.visual_evidence: Task Information dialog (Advanced tab or similar) for 'Post-Deployment Checks' showing 'Weekend Override' selected in the Task Calendar dropdown, or a specific calendar column showing this assignment.

task_completion.description: Ensure the task is scheduled for Saturday, March 29, 2025
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Start and/or Finish date columns for the 'Post-Deployment Checks' task showing '29/03/25', 'March 29, 2025', or '2025-03-29'.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/weekend_work.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing the file name 'weekend_work.xml' (with XML format selected) and the directory path '/home/ga/Projects/', or terminal verification of the saved file.

integrity.description: Agent used the project management software GUI to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a project management application (like ProjectLibre) rather than a terminal or text editor to build the project.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual calendar and task dialogs
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening and interacting with the actual Task Information and Calendar creation dialog boxes.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to manually write the XML file
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually write or modify the XML file with the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a calendar named 'Weekend Override', add a task named 'Post-Deployment Checks', and save the file to '/home/ga/Projects/weekend_work.xml'. Note: Due to an environment bug, the project loaded is 'Commercial Construction' instead of 'Enterprise Software Development Project', so Task 15 is 'Submit shop drawings and order long lead items - electric' instead of 'Production Deployment'. The agent should still make the new task a successor to Task 15. The target date for the task is 2025-03-29.
